title: YTP Vimes by DaThings
description:
An occurrence that happens to me a lot is that I'll think of a joke and try to keep it in mind for when I use its source for a full YTP. Inevitably that hypothetical YTP never happens, so I'm left with jokes that either become forgotten or just never end up happening.

Before Vine as a service was discontinued, I had toyed with the idea of uploading some clips from my existing YTPs to the platform and seeing where they'd go. Then after service ended I had the idea to make brand new, one-off jokes that fit the 7-second format. The idea seemed too little too late until I realized that most Vine content I've personally seen was here on YouTube.

So, voila! A sort of vine compilation of the YTP variety by yours truly. I think when a tiny joke idea comes to mind going forward, I'll jot it down and whip it up in my editor for future compilations like this one. I had a lot of fun and I hope you enjoy this latest project :)


Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support
